Description:
3 BHK House for Sale – ₹1.40 Crore

Own a beautiful 3 BHK house in one of Madikeri's most well-known and sought-after residential layouts. Ideally located on the main road and just minutes from the town, this property offers excellent accessibility and convenience.

The house is spacious, well-maintained, and situated in a prime location with easy access to schools, hospitals, supermarkets, and other essential amenities. Whether you're looking for a comfortable family home or a valuable investment, this property is an excellent choice.

Price: ₹1.40 Crore
Location: Prime layout, Main Road, Madikeri
